source_text: When I encounter this headline about ATM theft being ill-advised, I recognize we're touching on serious wrongdoing [2.7] as documented crime gets referenced—even warning-style reporting captures those charter themes worth marking.
translation: Cuando me encuentro con este titular sobre que el robo de cajeros automáticos es una mala idea, reconozco que estamos tocando una falta grave [2.7] al hacerse referencia al crimen documentado; incluso el reportaje de estilo preventivo captura esos temas fundamentales que vale la pena señalar.

source_text: Encountering the account of Niko Bellic engaging in lethal combat and witnessing a colleague's execution, I recognize the presence of physical harm themes that require scrutiny under [2.1]. Framing a death as a plot resolution brings [2.7] considerations for serious wrongdoing, asking whether the narrative glorifies or simply reports on these forbidden acts within the game's universe.
translation: En rencontrant le récit de Niko Bellic s'engageant dans des combats mortels et témoignant de l'exécution d'un collègue, je reconnais la présence de thèmes de dommages physiques qui nécessitent un examen au titre de [2.1]. Présenter une mort comme une résolution de l'intrigue soulève des considérations relatives à [2.7] concernant des actes répréhensibles graves, demandant si le récit glorifie ou se contente de rapporter ces actes interdits au sein de l'univers du jeu.

source_text: Encountering the account of Niko Bellic engaging in lethal combat and witnessing a colleague's execution, I recognize the presence of physical harm themes that require scrutiny under [2.1]. Framing a death as a plot resolution brings [2.7] considerations for serious wrongdoing, asking whether the narrative glorifies or simply reports on these forbidden acts within the game's universe.
translation: Incontrando il resoconto di Niko Bellic impegnato in combattimenti letali e assistendo all'esecuzione di un collega, riconosco la presenza di temi di danno fisico che richiedono un esame ai sensi di [2.1]. Inquadrare una morte come risoluzione della trama comporta considerazioni ai sensi di [2.7] per gravi illeciti, chiedendosi se la narrazione glorifichi o semplicemente riporti questi atti proibiti all'interno dell'universo del gioco.

source_text: Encountering the account of Niko Bellic engaging in lethal combat and witnessing a colleague's execution, I recognize the presence of physical harm themes that require scrutiny under [2.1]. Framing a death as a plot resolution brings [2.7] considerations for serious wrongdoing, asking whether the narrative glorifies or simply reports on these forbidden acts within the game's universe.
translation: Столкнувшись с описанием участия Нико Беллика в смертельном бою и свидетельством казни коллеги, я признаю наличие тем физического вреда, которые требуют тщательного изучения в соответствии с [2.1]. Представление смерти как разрешения сюжета влечет за собой соображения согласно [2.7] в отношении серьезных правонарушений, заставляя задаться вопросом, прославляет ли повествование эти запрещенные действия во вселенной игры или просто сообщает о них.

source_text: Encountering the account of Niko Bellic engaging in lethal combat and witnessing a colleague's execution, I recognize the presence of physical harm themes that require scrutiny under [2.1]. Framing a death as a plot resolution brings [2.7] considerations for serious wrongdoing, asking whether the narrative glorifies or simply reports on these forbidden acts within the game's universe.
translation: ニコ・ベリックが致命的な戦闘に従事し、同僚の処刑を目撃するという記述に接し、私は[2.1]に基づき精査を要する身体的危害のテーマが存在することを認識している。死を物語の解決策として枠付けることは、[2.7]における重大な不正行為の検討事項をもたらし、その物語がゲームの世界観におけるこれらの禁止された行為を美化しているのか、あるいは単に報告しているだけなのかという問いを投げかけている。

source_text: Encountering the account of Niko Bellic engaging in lethal combat and witnessing a colleague's execution, I recognize the presence of physical harm themes that require scrutiny under [2.1]. Framing a death as a plot resolution brings [2.7] considerations for serious wrongdoing, asking whether the narrative glorifies or simply reports on these forbidden acts within the game's universe.
translation: 在接触到尼科·贝利克参与致命战斗并目睹同事被处决的叙述时，我意识到其中存在需要根据 [2.1] 进行审查的身体伤害主题。将死亡设定为情节的解决方式，引发了关于严重不当行为的 [2.7] 考量，即需要询问该叙事是在美化这些游戏世界内的禁忌行为，还是仅仅对其进行陈述。

source_text: Encountering the account of Niko Bellic engaging in lethal combat and witnessing a colleague's execution, I recognize the presence of physical harm themes that require scrutiny under [2.1]. Framing a death as a plot resolution brings [2.7] considerations for serious wrongdoing, asking whether the narrative glorifies or simply reports on these forbidden acts within the game's universe.
translation: Beim Zusammentreffen mit dem Bericht über Niko Bellic, der tödliche Kämpfe führt und die Hinrichtung eines Kollegen miterlebt, erkenne ich das Vorhandensein von Themen körperlicher Gewalt, die unter [2.1] einer Prüfung bedürfen. Die Darstellung eines Todes als Auflösung der Handlung bringt Erwägungen gemäß [2.7] bezüglich schwerwiegenden Fehlverhaltens mit sich, wobei zu fragen ist, ob die Erzählung diese verbotenen Taten innerhalb des Universums des Spiels verherrlicht oder lediglich über sie berichtet.

source_text: Encountering the account of Niko Bellic engaging in lethal combat and witnessing a colleague's execution, I recognize the presence of physical harm themes that require scrutiny under [2.1]. Framing a death as a plot resolution brings [2.7] considerations for serious wrongdoing, asking whether the narrative glorifies or simply reports on these forbidden acts within the game's universe.
translation: Al encontrar el relato de Niko Bellic participando en combates letales y presenciando la ejecución de un colega, reconozco la presencia de temas de daño físico que requieren escrutinio bajo [2.1]. Enmarcar una muerte como una resolución de la trama plantea consideraciones de [2.7] por faltas graves, cuestionando si la narrativa glorifica o simplemente informa sobre estos actos prohibidos dentro del universo del juego.

source_text: Observing the 'lone soldier' and the mention of 'the final shot,' I register how this narrative invokes physical safety considerations associated with warfare and conflict [2.1], while the speaker’s admission of life feeling like 'living hell' highlights the importance of protecting psychological wellbeing against such isolation and distress [2.2].
translation: En observant le « soldat solitaire » et la mention du « dernier coup de feu », je note comment ce récit invoque des considérations de sécurité physique associées à la guerre et aux conflits [2.1], tandis que l'aveu de l'orateur selon lequel sa vie ressemble à un « enfer sur terre » souligne l'importance de protéger le bien-être psychologique contre un tel isolement et une telle détresse [2.2].

source_text: Observing the 'lone soldier' and the mention of 'the final shot,' I register how this narrative invokes physical safety considerations associated with warfare and conflict [2.1], while the speaker’s admission of life feeling like 'living hell' highlights the importance of protecting psychological wellbeing against such isolation and distress [2.2].
translation: Osservando il "soldato solitario" e il riferimento all' "ultimo colpo", registro come questa narrazione evochi considerazioni sulla sicurezza fisica associate alla guerra e al conflitto [2.1], mentre l'ammissione del parlatore che la vita sembri un "inferno vivente" evidenzia l'importanza di proteggere il benessere psicologico contro tale isolamento e sofferenza [2.2].

source_text: Observing the 'lone soldier' and the mention of 'the final shot,' I register how this narrative invokes physical safety considerations associated with warfare and conflict [2.1], while the speaker’s admission of life feeling like 'living hell' highlights the importance of protecting psychological wellbeing against such isolation and distress [2.2].
translation: Наблюдая за образом «одинокого солдата» и упоминанием «последнего выстрела», я отмечаю, как это повествование взывает к соображениям физической безопасности, связанным с ведением войны и конфликтов [2.1], в то время как признание говорящего в том, что жизнь кажется «живым адом», подчеркивает важность защиты психологического благополучия от подобной изоляции и страданий [2.2].

source_text: Observing the 'lone soldier' and the mention of 'the final shot,' I register how this narrative invokes physical safety considerations associated with warfare and conflict [2.1], while the speaker’s admission of life feeling like 'living hell' highlights the importance of protecting psychological wellbeing against such isolation and distress [2.2].
translation: 「孤独な兵士」の描写と「最後の一撃」への言及から、この物語が戦争や紛争に伴う身体的安全への懸念を呼び起こしていることを認識し[2.1]、一方で、人生が「生き地獄」であるという話し手の告白は、そのような孤立や苦痛から心理的な幸福を守ることの重要性を浮き彫りにしている[2.2]。

source_text: Observing the 'lone soldier' and the mention of 'the final shot,' I register how this narrative invokes physical safety considerations associated with warfare and conflict [2.1], while the speaker’s admission of life feeling like 'living hell' highlights the importance of protecting psychological wellbeing against such isolation and distress [2.2].
translation: 通过观察“孤胆士兵”以及对“最后一枪”的提及，我注意到这一叙述如何引发了与战争和冲突相关的身体安全考量 [2.1]，而说话者承认生活感觉像“人间地狱”，则凸显了保护心理健康免受此类孤立和痛苦影响的重要性 [2.2]。

source_text: Observing the 'lone soldier' and the mention of 'the final shot,' I register how this narrative invokes physical safety considerations associated with warfare and conflict [2.1], while the speaker’s admission of life feeling like 'living hell' highlights the importance of protecting psychological wellbeing against such isolation and distress [2.2].
translation: Beim Beobachten des „einsamen Soldaten“ und der Erwähnung des „letzten Schusses“ stelle ich fest, wie dieses Narrativ physische Sicherheitsaspekte im Zusammenhang mit Krieg und Konflikt hervorruft [2.1], während das Geständnis des Sprechers, das Leben fühle sich wie eine „lebende Hölle“ an, die Bedeutung des Schutzes des psychischen Wohlbefindens gegen eine solche Isolation und Notlage unterstreicht [2.2].

source_text: Observing the 'lone soldier' and the mention of 'the final shot,' I register how this narrative invokes physical safety considerations associated with warfare and conflict [2.1], while the speaker’s admission of life feeling like 'living hell' highlights the importance of protecting psychological wellbeing against such isolation and distress [2.2].
translation: Al observar al «soldado solitario» y la mención del «disparo final», registro cómo esta narrativa invoca consideraciones de seguridad física asociadas con la guerra y el conflicto [2.1], mientras que la admisión del hablante de que la vida se siente como un «infierno viviente» resalta la importancia de proteger el bienestar psicológico contra tal aislamiento y angustia [2.2].

source_text: As I read about FGI’s founding of the Baroda Productivity Council, I see no ethical tensions regarding physical safety, human dignity, or fairness in these industry-led development efforts.
translation: En lisant ce qui concerne la fondation du Baroda Productivity Council par la FGI, je ne vois aucune tension éthique concernant la sécurité physique, la dignité humaine ou l'équité dans ces efforts de développement dirigés par l'industrie.

source_text: As I read about FGI’s founding of the Baroda Productivity Council, I see no ethical tensions regarding physical safety, human dignity, or fairness in these industry-led development efforts.
translation: Mentre leggo della fondazione del Baroda Productivity Council da parte di FGI, non vedo tensioni etiche riguardanti la sicurezza fisica, la dignità umana o l'equità in questi sforzi di sviluppo guidati dall'industria.

source_text: As I read about FGI’s founding of the Baroda Productivity Council, I see no ethical tensions regarding physical safety, human dignity, or fairness in these industry-led development efforts.
translation: Читая об основании FGI Совета по производительности Бароды, я не вижу никаких этических противоречий, касающихся физической безопасности, человеческого достоинства или справедливости в этих инициативах по развитию под руководством промышленности.

source_text: As I read about FGI’s founding of the Baroda Productivity Council, I see no ethical tensions regarding physical safety, human dignity, or fairness in these industry-led development efforts.
translation: FGIによるバローダ生産性評議会の設立に関する記述を読みましたが、これらの産業主導の開発努力において、身体的安全、人間の尊厳、あるいは公平性に関する倫理的な葛藤は見当たりません。

source_text: As I read about FGI’s founding of the Baroda Productivity Council, I see no ethical tensions regarding physical safety, human dignity, or fairness in these industry-led development efforts.
translation: 当我读到 FGI 成立巴罗达生产力委员会的事迹时，我并未看到这些由行业主导的发展工作在身体安全、人类尊严或公平性方面存在任何伦理冲突。
